# CWE-603: billing mutation requires server-validated session subject.
lang: go
file: CWE-603-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func UpdateBilling(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	uid := c.GetString("uid")
	if uid == "" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if uid != c.Param("id") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	db.Exec("UPDATE billing SET plan = ? WHERE user_id = ?", c.PostForm("plan"), uid)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
